name: checklist_fluid
prompt: What should I check when reviewing Fluid templates?

name: review_existing_typoscript
prompt:
Review this TypoScript for issues:
```typoscript
page = PAGE
page.10 = FLUIDTEMPLATE
page.10.file = EXT:my_ext/template.html
config.no_cache = 1
[globalVar = GP:L=1]
  config.sys_language_uid = 1
[end]
```

name: review_flags_tsfe_getdata_v14
prompt:
Review this TYPO3 v14 TypoScript snippet: lib.link = TEXT
lib.link.typolink.parameter.data = TSFE:id
